fato_historico: 1983: The Black July anti-Tamil riots begin in Sri Lanka, killing between 400 and 3,000. Black July is generally regarded as the beginning of the Sri Lankan Civil War.
energia_do_dia: Today may invite you to reflect on the importance of peace and unity in your inner world. Much like the cooling winds that eventually calm the most turbulent storms, consider focusing on healing old wounds. It is a good time to cultivate serenity, allowing patience to bridge gaps and transform complex challenges into quiet strength.
frase_do_dia: Peace begins within the heart and radiates outwards to touch the entire world.
significado_numero: A number representing the delicate balance of nurturing and stability.
conselho: Focus on acts of kindness to restore equilibrium in your daily interactions.
